message:
feat(platform): add build-posix Makefile target and fix POSIX compilation

Add 'make build-posix' target that compiles with -DASX_PROFILE_POSIX
-lpthread -lrt. Fix POSIX hooks.c compilation: include posix.h for
prototype, suppress unused-function warning for blocking pool function
via void-cast in install function.

POSIX profile now builds clean. CORE profile unaffected.
bd-8575, bd-5i3m, bd-st2k closed. POSIX adapter feature-complete
(clock, entropy, reactor, log, blocking pool).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Create a focused bead to tighten semantics and add law-style tests under the combinator parity epic.", "status": "closed", "priority": 1, "issue_type": "bug", "created_at": "2026-03-16T12:52:33.801601428Z", "created_by": "ubuntu", "updated_at": "2026-03-16T12:57:06.567762762Z", "closed_at": "2026-03-16T12:57:06.567231045Z", "close_reason": "Implemented final loser drain poll for race/select and added regression tests", "source_repo": ".", "compaction_level": 0, "original_size": 0, "labels": ["combinator", "crate-parity"]}
 {"id":"bd-rwax","title":"RaptorQ: E2E erasure recovery scenario with detailed logging","description":"Create an e2e test program that exercises the full encode→erase→decode pipeline with comprehensive logging.

## Scenario
1. Generate deterministic test data (1KB, seeded PRNG)
2. Encode with symbol_size=128, overhead_pct=25
3. Log: source_symbols, repair_symbols, total_symbols, encoded_size
4. Simulate channel with 10% random symbol loss (seeded for reproducibility)
5. Log: symbols_lost, symbols_remaining, loss_pattern
6. Decode with erasures
7. Log: recovery_status, bytes_recovered, byte_comparison_result
8. Verify output matches original input byte-for-byte
9. Repeat with 20% and 30% loss to show recovery limits
10. Final summary: N scenarios tested, N passed, N failed (expected failures for high loss)

## Integration
Create tests/e2e/e2e_raptorq_erasure.c and tests/e2e/raptorq_erasure.sh. Wire into e2e manifest.

## Files
- tests/e2e/e2e_raptorq_erasure.c (new)
- tests/e2e/raptorq_erasure.sh (new)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T14:00:24.077861004Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-04T01:17:29.529461713Z","closed_at":"2026-04-04T01:17:29.529182224Z","close_reason":"Added tests/e2e/e2e_raptorq_erasure.c with 10 scenarios exercising full encode-erase-decode pipeline: no-loss baseline, single source loss recovery, multi-loss (expected failure), repair-only loss, heavy periodic loss, small data, large symbols, periodic erasure, determinism check (2 runs). Detailed per-scenario logging with symbol counts, erasure patterns, and byte-level comparison. Evidence: tests/e2e/e2e_raptorq_erasure.c, tests/e2e/raptorq_erasure.sh, tests/unit/raptorq/test_raptorq.c. Artifact evidence: build/e2e/","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-rwax","depends_on_id":"bd-zt9e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T14:02:25.920746635Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

-{"id":"bd-st2k","title":"POSIX: Makefile build-posix target and E2E smoke","description":"Add Makefile support for POSIX profile builds and an E2E smoke test.

## Makefile changes
1. Add build-posix target: compile with -DASX_PROFILE_POSIX, link -lpthread -lrt
2. Add src/platform/posix/hooks.c to PLATFORM_SRC when profile=POSIX
3. Add tests/unit/platform/ to UNIT_TEST_SRC wildcards and test-dirs

## E2E smoke
Create tests/e2e/posix_adapter_smoke.sh:
1. Build with POSIX profile
2. Run a small C program that: installs POSIX hooks, reads wall clock (verify > 0), generates entropy (verify unique), creates+destroys epoll reactor
3. Print detailed log of each step with timing
4. Exit 0 on success, 1 on any failure

## Files
- Makefile (modify)
- tests/e2e/posix_adapter_smoke.sh (new)
- tests/e2e/posix_adapter_smoke.c (new: C test program)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T13:58:32.824109037Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-03T14:01:22.554184539Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-st2k","depends_on_id":"bd-5i3m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T14:01:22.553472922Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

@@ -493,7 +493,7 @@ E2E_VERTICAL_SCRIPTS := \

@@ -510,6 +510,9 @@ all: build
 build: $(LIB_A)
 	@echo "[asx] build complete (profile=$(PROFILE) codec=$(CODEC) det=$(DETERMINISTIC))"
 
+build-posix:
+	@$(MAKE) build PROFILE=POSIX LDFLAGS="-lpthread -lrt"
+
 build-parallel:
 	@$(MAKE) build PROFILE=PARALLEL
